title: Properties and Equivalences of Closed Sets in Metric Spaces
description: A flowchart illustrating the fundamental properties of closed sets and equivalent definitions, showing how they interrelate and lead to other important topological concepts.
elements: Contains all its Limit Points (A' ⊆ A)
Sequence Convergence (Limits of convergent sequences in A belong to A)
relationships: A Closed Set is defined by its Complement being Open
A Closed Set is equivalent to it Containing all its Limit Points
A Closed Set is equivalent to being equal to its own Closure
A Closed Set can be characterized by Sequence Convergence
The Intersection of any collection of Closed Sets is Closed
The Finite Union of any Closed Sets is Closed
